Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
STEVEN DERBY, 925-935-8923, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY
ANTHONY BENTIVEGNA FROM BECHERER KANNETT & SCHWEITZER, 510-658-3600, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY

ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JOHN HICKEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. ALTHOUGH THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS RUN AS TO NON-ASBESTOS CLAIMS. THE COMPLAINT INCLUDED AN ALLEGATION OF PERSONAL INJURY ARISING FROM ASBESTOS EXPOSURE TRIGGERING CCP 340.2. THE APPLICATION OF WHICH IS NOT LIMITED TO PARTICULAR ASBESTOS-RELATED ILLNESSES. THIS RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY ISSUES THAT MAY BE RAISED ON THE BASIS OF PLAINTIFF'S INCORRECT CIVIL COVER SHEET OR ANY FAILURE TO THE GENERAL ORDER RELATING TO ASBESTOS CASES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
